The '''Laser Battery''' was a static defense weapon developed, manufactured, and sold by the [[Wandrau Arms Corporation]].

When placed in strategic positions around a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] or other vulnerable targets, the Laser Battery was able to provide independent firepower that significantly increased the target's protection, making this common, free-floating solar-powered [[Laser/Legends|laser]] cannon weapon platform an extremely effective defensive weapon. It was able to provide a strong anti-[[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] capability to an otherwise under-defended installation.

More effective than [[Mine Type A|Mn/T1]] laser cannon mines, the Laser Battery was more costly to deploy in large numbers. This meant that while it was also a useful strategic weapon, it was far less widespread, and required the presence of a support station nearby where the gunnery crew might spend their off-duty hours. This also meant that it was subject to the further cost of employing [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] gunners.

The solar arrays on either side of the cannons provided all the power the weapon needed, so long as the Laser Battery was located a suitable distance from a primary star.

Because of its lightweight construction, its hull was very fragile, and was unable to withstand even a single hit from a laser cannon. However, with an effective shield system rated at 600 SBD, the Laser Battery was able to take some punishment.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
